specs.materials: 1" 45lb HD industrial-grade particle board with high-pressure scratch-resistant laminate, 3mm vinyl bonded edgeband, 16 ga 1.25" steel tube frame, fully welded with laser-cut support brackets
finishes_available: Standard laminates: Fusion Maple, Medium Oak, Wild Cherry, Tundra Sky/Ice, Catalina, Dragon Fire, Candy Apple
Professional laminates: Designer White, Mission Maple, Studio Teak, wood-tone alternatives
key_features: Adjustable legs: Aktivity 17"–25" or 22"–30"; Espire 17"–25", 22"–30", 24"–36", or 30"–42"; fixed-post 29.5"; standing 34"–42"
Swivel floor glides standard; optional 2 or 4 locking swivel castors
